questions.hindi: फैक्ट्री की असेंबली लाइन तेज़ चलती है।
options: There was complete silence at night.
Cricket is the most popular sport in India.
The factory's assembly line runs fast.
questions.answer: The factory's assembly line runs fast.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "फैक्ट्री की असेंबली लाइन तेज़ चलती है।" = "The factory's assembly line runs fast."

questions.sentence: Cricket is the most _____ sport in India.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "Cricket is the most popular sport in India."

questions.sentence: The football team won the match yesterday.
options: The football team won the match yesterday.
The football team won the match.
questions.answer: The football team won the match.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "The football team won the match."

options: He scored a goal and won the match.
Multiplying three by five gives fifteen.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "हॉकी हमारा राष्ट्रीय खेल है।" = "Hockey is our national game."
Full sentence: "I like playing badminton."

questions.sentence: He got first place in the race yesterday.
options: He got first place in the race yesterday.
He got first place in the race.
questions.answer: He got first place in the race.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He got first place in the race."

questions.hindi: खिलाड़ी मैदान में दौड़ रहे हैं।
options: There is a lot of noise in the factory.
The factory's assembly line runs fast.
The players are running on the field.
questions.answer: The players are running on the field.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "खिलाड़ी मैदान में दौड़ रहे हैं।" = "The players are running on the field."
Full sentence: "The team performed well."
Correct sentence: "The match is tomorrow evening."

questions.hindi: गेंद सीमा के बाहर चली गई।
options: He scored a goal and won the match.
The ball went out of the boundary.
questions.answer: The ball went out of the boundary.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "गेंद सीमा के बाहर चली गई।" = "The ball went out of the boundary."

questions.sentence: He scored a goal _____ won the match.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "He scored a goal and won the match."
Correct sentence: "This sound is very loud."

options: The total number is one hundred.
The players are running on the field.
There is a lot of noise in the factory.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "उसकी आवाज़ बहुत धीमी है।" = "His voice is very soft."

questions.sentence: There is a lot _____ noise in the factory.
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "There is a lot of noise in the factory."

questions.sentence: There were complete silence at night.
options: There were complete silence at night.
There was complete silence at night.
questions.answer: There was complete silence at night.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "There was complete silence at night."

options: The football team won the match.
The ball went out of the boundary.
An echo was heard in the mountains.
questions.answer: An echo was heard in the mountains.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "पहाड़ों में गूंज सुनाई दी।" = "An echo was heard in the mountains."
Full sentence: "I like listening to music."

questions.sentence: Multiplying three by five gives fifteen yesterday.
options: Multiplying three by five gives fifteen yesterday.
Multiplying three by five gives fifteen.
questions.answer: Multiplying three by five gives fifteen.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Multiplying three by five gives fifteen."

questions.hindi: बीस को पाँच से भाग देने पर चार होता है।
options: He got first place in the race.
The total number is one hundred.
Dividing twenty by five gives four.
questions.answer: Dividing twenty by five gives four.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "बीस को पाँच से भाग देने पर चार होता है।" = "Dividing twenty by five gives four."
Full sentence: "The total number is one hundred."
